description_long: This rifle features a classic design with a wooden fixed stock and foregrip, paired with a matte black metal receiver and barrel assembly. The barrel is of standard length and is fitted with a flash hider at the muzzle. The rifle is equipped with iron sights, with the front sight post and rear sight both clearly visible. A detachable box magazine is inserted into the magazine well beneath the receiver. The overall finish combines the warmth of wood with the utilitarian look of matte black metal, giving it a robust and reliable appearance. The rifle's proportions and details suggest it is designed for practical use in urban or field environments.
description: A classic rifle with a wooden fixed stock, matte black metal receiver and barrel, iron sights, and a detachable box magazine.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the muzzle end, showing the flash hider and the alignment of the barrel and iron sights.
description_view_1: A full left-side profile reveals the wooden stock, foregrip, metal receiver, standard barrel, iron sights, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_2: Viewed from the buttstock end, the rifle's stock and rear sight are prominent, with the barrel receding into the distance.
description_view_3: A full right-side profile similar to view 1, displaying the wooden and metal components, magazine, and sighting system.
